titleStmt.title: SII 9.484: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 484. (A.R. No. 724 of 1922.) ON TWO PIECES OF A BROKEN SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE HANUMANTARAYA TEMPLE AT HAMPEDEVANAHALLI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1433, Prajāpati, Chaitra, śu. 13, Budhavāra corresponding to A.D. 1511 March 12 Wednesday, in the reign of Kṛishṇarāya-Mahārāya. It records the gift of the village Haṁpadēvahaḷḷi, surnamed Kṛishṇarāyapura, in Nāri-sīme to various Brāhmans (named), in the presence of the god Virūpākshadēvā on the bank of the Tuṅgabhadrā river. It refers to a copper-plate grant issued in this connection.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē
trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī
jayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavarṣa 1433 neya prajāpati
saṁvachsarada caitra śu 13 bu lu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrakruṣṇarāya
mahārāyarū nānāgōtrada nānāśākheya Asēṣavi
dva(ṁ)nmahājanaṁgaḷige koṭṭa Agrahāra bhūdānada kramaveṁ
tiyavēṁṭheyada
nārisīmeya voḷagaṇa haṁpadēvahaḷḷi yeṁba grā
nū śrīkruṣṇarāyapuraveṁdu pratināmava māḍi sarvamā(ṁ)
nyada Agrahāravanū tuṁgabhadrātīra bhāskarakṣētra
śrīvirūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiyalu namage puṇyavāga
bēkū yeṁdu �yo tathātithiya manvādipu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu sa
hira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadānadhārāpūrvaka sadyeḥparichsēdavāgi dhā
reyaneṟadu koṭṭa tāṁbraśāsanavannū koṭṭu māḍi
da vritti 105 Akṣāradalū yidē nūṟaAidu vri
ttiya kṣētrakke Ātrēyagōtrada rukuśākheya cippagiriya
haṁpaṁṇagaḷa makkaḷu liṁgaṁṇagaḷige vritti 4 . rēkhe
kāśyapagōtrada rukuśākheya Iṁmaḍi (bha)
bhaṭara makkaḷu śivādīkṣitarige vritti 3 Ātrēyagōtra
da rukuśākheya sidhanāthabhaṭara makkaḷu Āreya kruṣṇabha
ṭṭarige vritti 3 kāśyapagōtrada yajuśākheya nārasibhaṭṭa
ra makkaḷu sōmābhaṭṭarige vritti 4 kāśyapagōtrada yajuśā
kheya nallacilameya peddibhaṭṭara makkaḷu viśvanāthabhaṭṭari
ge vritti 4 bhāradvājagōtrada rukuśākheya Ālūra basavā
bhaṭṭara makkaḷu virupākṣabhaṭṭarige vritti 5 kauśikagō
trada yajuśākheya perumaki Aubhaḷabhaṭara makkaḷu jñāna
dēvabhaṭṭarige vritti 4 vaśiṣṭagōtrada rukuśākheya mallibha
ṭṭara makkaḷu dēmābhaṭṭarige vritti 3 bhāradvājagōtrada ya
juśākheya svayaṁpāka bācaṇabhaṭṭara makkaḷu rāmā
bhaṭṭarige vritti 4 viśvāmitragōtrada rukuśākheya
jaṭeya viṭhaṇabhaṭara makkaḷu sōmābhaṭṭarige pratti 3

gautamagōtrada yajuśākheya yāyāvara
gauridēvabhaṭṭara makkaḷu mallibhaṭṭarige vritti 4
kauśikagōtrada rukuśākheya kruṣṇabhaṭṭara ma
kkaḷu tirumalabhaṭṭarige vritti 2 śāṇḍilyagō
trada yajuśākheya Iṭṭigeya lakhaṇabhaṭṭara makka
dēvabhaṭṭarige vritti 4 kāśyapagōtrada śuklayajuśākhe
ya ceṁnābhaṭṭara makkaḷu rēvaṇabhaṭṭarige vritti 3 va
śiṣṭagōtrada rukuśākheya maḷigeya Anaṁtabha
makkaḷu viṣṇubhaṭṭarige vritti 3 bhāradvājagōtra
maligeya Anaṁtabha
makkaḷu viṣṇubhaṭṭarige vritti 4 bhāradvājagōtra
da yaju ratnabhaṭṭarige
viṭhalabhaṭṭarige vritti
tti 4 Ātrēyagōtrada
śākhe A
sadāśi rige dānavāgi
dēva sa grāma koḷagada
vija �yo Agrahārakke saluva Aṣṭabhōga
tējasāṁmya baḷi sahitavāgi nīū niṁ
ma putrapautrapāraṁpariyadiṁda Ācaṁdrārkastāyi
gaḷāgi sukhadiṁda Anubhavisuttirabēkeṁdu koṭṭa sarvamā
nyada Agrahāra . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrē
yōnupālanaṁ dānātsvargamavāpnōti pālanādaccu
taṁ padaṁ . maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.484 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
